And let your TG Preaching.preaching be the TG Warn.warning voice, every man to his neighbor, in mildness and in Titus 3:2.meekness.
And go ye Isa. 52:11.out from among the Ps. 26:4; Rom. 12:9.wicked. Save yourselves. Be ye Lev. 21:6; Ether 12:37.clean that bear the vessels of the Lord. Even so. Amen.

div.p: Revelation given through Joseph Smith the Prophet to James Covel, at Fayette, New York, January 5, 1831. James Covel, who had been a Methodist minister for about forty years, covenanted with the Lord that he would obey any command that the Lord would give to him through Joseph the Prophet.

1–4, The Saints have power to become the sons of God; 5–6, To receive the gospel is to receive Christ; 7–14, James Covel is commanded to be baptized and labor in the Lord’s vineyard; 15–21, The Lord’s servants are to preach the gospel before the Second Coming; 22–24, Those who receive the gospel will be gathered in time and in eternity.

chapter.verse:
Hearken and listen to the voice of him who is from all Heb. 13:8; D&C 20:12; 35:1; 38:1 (1–4); 76:4. TG Eternity.eternity to all eternity, the Great Ex. 3:14; Isa. 44:6; Rev. 1:8. TG Jesus Christ, Jehovah.

The TG Jesus Christ, Light of the World.light and the life of the world; a light which shineth in darkness and the darkness comprehendeth it not;
The same which came in the D&C 20:26; Moses 5:57; 6:57 (57, 62); 7:46.meridian of time unto mine own, and mine own TG Prophets, Rejection of.received me not;
But to as many as received me, gave I power to become my John 1:12. TG Sons and Daughters of God.sons; and even so will I give unto as many as will receive me, power to become my sons.
And verily, verily, I say unto you, he that receiveth my gospel John 13:20.receiveth me; and he that TG Teachable.receiveth not my gospel receiveth not me.

Nevertheless, thou hast seen great Mosiah 7:29.sorrow, for thou hast John 12:48; Alma 10:6.rejected me many times because of pride and the cares of the Matt. 13:22; Hel. 7:5.world.

But, behold, the days of thy TG Deliver.deliverance are come, if thou wilt D&C 40:3 (1–3).hearken to my voice, which saith unto thee: Arise and be baptized, and TG Baptism, Essential; Purity; Repent.wash away your sins, calling on my name, and you shall receive my Spirit, and a blessing so great as you never have known.

And if thou do this, I have prepared thee for a greater work. Thou shalt preach the Rom. 15:29; D&C 18:4.fulness of my gospel, which I have sent forth in these last days, the D&C 1:22.covenant which I have sent forth to TG Israel, Restoration of.recover my people, which are of the house of Israel.

Behold, verily, verily, I say unto thee, thou art not called to go into the eastern countries, but thou art called to go to the Ohio.

And inasmuch as my people shall assemble themselves at the Ohio, I have kept in store a D&C 38:32; 43:16; 95:8 (8–9); 110:9 (8–10).blessing such as is not known among the children of men, and it shall be poured forth upon their heads. And from thence men shall go forth into D&C 1:2, 34 (34–35); 18:28 (26–28); 42:58.all TG Missionary Work.nations.

Behold, verily, verily, I say unto you, that the people in Ohio call upon me in much faith, thinking I will 2 Sam. 24:16; Moses 7:51.stay my hand in judgment upon the nations, but I cannot 2 Tim. 2:13.deny my word.
Wherefore lay to with your might and call faithful laborers into my vineyard, that it may be Jacob 5:61 (61–75); D&C 24:19; 95:4.pruned for the last time.

Wherefore, go forth, crying with a loud voice, saying: The kingdom of heaven is at Matt. 3:2.hand; crying: Hosanna! blessed be the name of the Most High God.
Go forth TG Baptism, Essential.baptizing with water, preparing the way before my face for the time of my TG Jesus Christ, Prophecies about; Jesus Christ, Second Coming.coming;
For the time is at hand; the Matt. 24:36; 1 Cor. 5:5.day or the hour no man JS—M 1:40.knoweth; but it surely shall Hab. 2:3.come.
And he that receiveth these things receiveth me; and they shall be D&C 10:65.gathered unto me in time and in eternity.

And again, it shall come to pass that on as many as ye shall baptize with water, ye shall lay your TG Hands, Laying on of.hands, and they shall receive the TG Holy Ghost, Gift of.gift of the Holy Ghost, and shall be Rev. 3:3; D&C 35:15; 45:39.looking forth for the signs of my 2 Pet. 3:12.coming, and shall know me.
Behold, I come quickly. Even so. Amen.

div.p: Revelation given to Joseph Smith the Prophet and Sidney Rigdon, at Fayette, New York, January 6, 1831. Preceding the record of this revelation, the Prophet’s history states, “As James [Covel] rejected the word of the Lord, and returned to his former principles and people, the Lord gave unto me and Sidney Rigdon the following revelation” (see section 39).
1–3, Fear of persecution and cares of the world cause rejection of the gospel.

chapter.verse: Behold, verily I say unto you, that the heart of my servant D&C 39:7.James Covel was right before me, for he covenanted with me that he would obey my word.

And he Mark 4:16.received the word with gladness, but straightway Satan TG Test.tempted him; and the fear of Matt. 13:21 (20–22). TG Persecution.persecution and the cares of the world caused him to TG Apostasy of Individuals.reject the word.
Wherefore he D&C 39:10 (7–24).broke my covenant, and it remaineth with me to do with him as seemeth me good. Amen.

div.p: Revelation given through Joseph Smith the Prophet to the Church, at Kirtland, Ohio, February 4, 1831. This revelation instructs the Prophet and Church elders to pray to receive God’s “law” (see section 42). Joseph Smith had just arrived in Kirtland from New York, and Leman Copley, a Church member in nearby Thompson, Ohio, “requested Brother Joseph and Sidney [Rigdon] … live with him and he would furnish them houses and provisions.” The following revelation clarifies where Joseph and Sidney should live and also calls Edward Partridge to be the Church’s first bishop.
1–3, The elders will govern the Church by the spirit of revelation; 4–6, True disciples will receive and keep the Lord’s law; 7–12, Edward Partridge is named as a bishop unto the Church.

chapter.verse: Hearken and Deut. 32:1.hear, O ye my people, saith the Lord and your God, ye whom I delight to bless with the greatest of all TG Blessing.blessings, ye that hear me; and ye that hear me not will I Deut. 11:28; 1 Ne. 2:23; D&C 50:8. TG Curse.curse, that have D&C 50:4; 56:1; 112:26.professed my TG Jesus Christ, Taking the Name of.name, with the heaviest of all cursings.
Hearken, O ye elders of my church whom I have called, behold I give unto you a commandment, that ye shall assemble yourselves together to TG Unity.agree upon my word;

And by the prayer of your faith ye shall receive my D&C 42:2 (1–93). TG God, Law of.law, that ye may know how to govern my TG Jesus Christ, Head of the Church.church and have all things right before me.
And I will be your Zech. 14:9; 1 Tim. 6:15 (14–15); D&C 45:59. TG Governments.ruler when I TG Jesus Christ, Second Coming.come; and behold, I come quickly, and ye shall see that my law is kept.

He that Matt. 7:24.receiveth my Josh. 1:8; Jer. 26:4; Mosiah 3:14 (14–15); 13:29 (29–32); Alma 25:15 (15–16).law and Rom. 2:13; James 1:22 (22–25); D&C 42:60.doeth it, the same is my disciple; and he that saith he receiveth it and Matt. 21:30. TG Hypocrisy.doeth it not, the same is not my disciple, and shall be D&C 42:37; 50:8 (8–9); 64:35. TG Excommunication.cast out from among you;

For it is not meet that the things which belong to the children of the kingdom should be given to them that are not worthy, or to Matt. 15:26; Mark 7:27 (25–30).dogs, or the Matt. 7:6. TG Holiness.pearls to be cast before swine.
And again, it is meet that my servant Joseph Smith, Jun., should have a D&C 42:71 (70–73).house built, in which to live and IE translate the Bible. D&C 37:1; 45:60–62; 73:3; 76:15; 93:53.translate.
And again, it is meet that my servant Sidney Rigdon should live as seemeth him good, inasmuch as he keepeth my commandments.

And again, I have called my servant D&C 36:1; 42:10.Edward Partridge; and I give a commandment, that he should be appointed by the voice of the church, and ordained a D&C 58:24 (14–24); 68:14; 72:6 (6, 9–12); 107:69 (69–75). TG Bishop.bishop unto the church, to leave his merchandise and to D&C 51:1 (1–20); 57:7; 58:17 (14–18).spend all his time in the labors of the church;
To see to all things as it shall be appointed unto him in my laws in the day that I shall give them.
And this because his heart is pure before me, for he is like unto John 1:47.Nathanael of old, in whom there is no TG Guile.guile.

These words are given unto you, and they are pure before me; wherefore, beware how you hold them, for they are to be answered upon your TG Accountability; Responsibility.souls in the day of judgment. Even so. Amen.

div.p: Revelation given in two parts through Joseph Smith the Prophet, at Kirtland, Ohio, February 9 and 23, 1831. The first part, consisting of verses 1 through 72, was received in the presence of twelve elders and in fulfillment of the Lord’s promise previously made that the “law” would be given in Ohio (see section 38:32). The second portion consists of verses 73 through 93. The Prophet specifies this revelation as “embracing the law of the Church.”

1–10, The elders are called to preach the gospel, baptize converts, and build up the Church; 11–12, They must be called and ordained and are to teach the principles of the gospel found in the scriptures; 13–17, They are to teach and prophesy by the power of the Spirit; 18–29, The Saints are commanded not to kill, steal, lie, lust, commit adultery, or speak evil against others; 30–39, Laws governing the consecration of properties are set forth; 40–42, Pride and idleness are condemned; 43–52, The sick are to be healed through administrations and by faith; 53–60, The scriptures govern the Church and are to be proclaimed to the world; 61–69, The site of the New Jerusalem and the mysteries of the kingdom will be revealed; 70–73, Consecrated properties are to be used to support Church officers; 74–93, Laws governing fornication, adultery, killing, stealing, and confession of sins are set forth.

chapter.verse: Hearken, O ye elders of my TG Jesus Christ, Head of the Church.church, who have assembled yourselves together in my name, even Jesus Christ the Son of the living God, the Savior of the world; inasmuch as ye believe on my name and keep my commandments.
Again I say unto you, hearken and hear and obey the Jer. 26:4; D&C 41:3; 43:2; 58:23. TG God, Law of.law which I shall give unto you.

For verily I say, as ye have assembled yourselves together according to the D&C 38:32.commandment wherewith I commanded you, and are agreed as Matt. 18:19.touching this one thing, and have asked the Father in my name, even so ye shall receive.

Behold, verily I say unto you, I give unto you this first commandment, that ye shall TG Mission of Latter-day Saints.go forth in my name, every one of you, excepting my servants Joseph Smith, Jun., and Sidney Rigdon.
And I give unto them a commandment that they shall go forth for a little season, and it shall be TG Guidance, Divine; Holy Ghost, Mission of.given by the power of the Spirit when they shall return.

And ye shall go forth in the power of my Spirit, preaching my gospel, Mark 6:7; Rom. 10:14. TG Gospel; Missionary Work.two by two, in my name, lifting up your voices as with the sound of a Isa. 58:1.trump, declaring my word like unto angels of God.
And ye shall go forth baptizing with water, saying: Repent ye, repent ye, for the kingdom of heaven is at hand.
And from this place ye shall go forth into the regions westward; and inasmuch as ye shall find them that will receive you ye shall D&C 30:6; 39:13.build up my church in every region—

Until the time shall come when it shall be revealed unto you from on high, when the D&C 57:2.city of the Ether 13:6 (2–11); D&C 45:66 (66–71); 48:4; 64:30; 84:2, 4 (2–5); Moses 7:62; A of F 1:10. TG Jerusalem, New.New Jerusalem shall be prepared, that ye may be TG Israel, Gathering of.gathered in one, that ye may be my Zech. 8:8.people and I will be your God.

And again, I say unto you, that my servant D&C 41:9 (9–11); 50:39; 124:19.Edward Partridge shall stand in the office whereunto I have TG Delegation of Responsibility.appointed him. And it shall come to pass, that if he transgress D&C 35:18 (17–18); 64:40; 104:77; 107:99 (99–100).another shall be appointed in his stead. Even so. Amen.

Again I say unto you, that it shall not be given to any one to go forth to TG Missionary Work; Preaching.preach my gospel, or to build up my church, except he be TG Called of God; Priesthood, Authority; Priesthood, Ordination; Priesthood, Qualifying for.ordained by some one who has Acts 18:27. TG Authority; Leadership.authority, and it is known to the church that he has authority and has been regularly ordained by the heads of the church.

And again, the TG Elder, Melchizedek Priesthood.elders, priests and teachers of this church shall Mosiah 18:19 (19–20); D&C 5:10; 31:4; 52:9 (9, 36). TG Education; Mission of Latter-day Saints; Priesthood, Magnifying Callings within.teach the principles of my gospel, which are in the Bible and the TG Book of Mormon.Book of Mormon, in the which is the Rom. 15:29; D&C 35:17; 135:3. TG Scriptures, Value of.fulness of the TG Gospel.gospel.

And they shall TG Commitment.observe the IE D&C 20 (see the section 20 heading). D&C 1:6 (6, 37); 33:14; 51:4; 68:24.covenants and church articles to D&C 84:57.do them, and these shall be their teachings, as they shall be Gal. 5:18.directed by the Spirit.

And the Spirit shall be given unto you D&C 63:64. TG Prayer.by the prayer of faith; and if ye receive not the Ex. 35:34; 1 Cor. 4:20. TG Holy Ghost, Mission of; Missionary Work; Teacher; Teaching; Teaching with the Spirit.Spirit ye shall not teach.
And all this ye shall observe to do as I have TG Commandments of God.commanded concerning your teaching, until the fulness of my D&C 35:20; 42:56 (56–58).scriptures is given.
And as ye shall lift up your voices by the 2 Pet. 1:21; D&C 18:32; 34:10; 68:3.Comforter, ye shall speak and prophesy as seemeth me good;
For, behold, the 1 Cor. 2:10. TG Holy Ghost, Comforter.Comforter knoweth all things, and D&C 1:39; 20:27. TG Holy Ghost, Source of Testimony.beareth record of the Father and of the Son.

And now, behold, I speak unto the church. Thou shalt not Ex. 20:13 (13–17); Deut. 5:17 (17–21); Matt. 5:21 (21–37); Mosiah 13:21 (21–24); 3 Ne. 12:21 (21–37).kill; and he that TG Life, Sanctity of; Murder.kills shall D&C 76:34; 84:41; 132:27.not have forgiveness in this world, nor in the world to come.
And again, I say, thou shalt not kill; but he that TG Blood, Shedding of.killeth shall TG Capital Punishment.die.
Thou shalt not steal; and he that TG Stealing.stealeth and will not repent shall be Zech. 5:3.cast out.
Thou shalt not Luke 18:20. TG Honesty; Lying.lie; he that lieth and will not repent shall be cast out.

Thou shalt TG Family, Love within; Love; Marriage, Continuing Courtship in; Marriage, Husbands; Marriage, Wives.love thy wife with all thy heart, and shalt Gen. 2:24 (23–24); D&C 49:15 (15–16); Moses 3:24 (23–24); Abr. 5:18 (17–18). TG Divorce.cleave unto her and none else.

And he that 2 Sam. 11:2. TG Carnal Mind; Lust.looketh upon a woman to lust after her shall deny the faith, and shall not have the D&C 63:16. TG Holy Ghost, Loss of.Spirit; and if he repents not he shall be cast out.
Thou shalt not commit Ezek. 18:6; Luke 18:20; D&C 63:14.adultery; and he that committeth TG Adulterer; Sexual Immorality.adultery, and repenteth not, shall be Prov. 6:33 (32–33).cast out.
But he that has committed adultery and repents with all his heart, and forsaketh it, and doeth it John 8:11. TG Forgive.no more, thou shalt forgive;
But if he doeth it Ps. 85:8; 2 Pet. 2:20.again, he shall not be forgiven, but shall be cast out.
Thou shalt not Prov. 3:29. TG Gossip; Slander.speak evil of thy neighbor, nor do him any harm.
Thou knowest my laws concerning these things are given in my scriptures; he that sinneth and TG Repent.repenteth not shall be TG Excommunication; Punish.cast out.
If thou John 14:15 (15, 21). TG Love.lovest me thou shalt TG Service.serve me and TG Obedience.keep all my commandments.

And behold, thou wilt remember the Prov. 31:20; Mosiah 4:26 (16–26); Alma 1:27; Hel. 4:12. TG Poor.poor, and Micah 4:13; D&C 72:15; 85:3. TG Consecration.consecrate of thy properties for their TG Welfare.support that which thou hast to impart unto them, with a covenant and a deed which cannot be broken.

And inasmuch as ye Dan. 4:27; Mosiah 2:17.impart of your Lev. 19:9. TG Generosity.substance unto the Job 29:12. TG Almsgiving; Poor.poor, ye will do it unto me; and they shall be D&C 58:35.laid before the TG Bishop.bishop of my church and his TG Counselor.counselors, two of the elders, or high priests, such as he shall appoint or has appointed and TG Setting Apart.set apart for that purpose.

And it shall come to pass, that after they are laid before the bishop of my church, and after that he has received these testimonies concerning the D&C 51:4; 64:15.consecration of the properties of my church, that they cannot be taken from the church, agreeable to my commandments, every man shall be made D&C 72:3 (3–11). TG Accountability; Judgment.accountable unto me, a D&C 72:17 (17, 22). TG Stewardship.steward over his own property, or that which he has received by consecration, as much as is sufficient for himself and D&C 51:3.family.

And again, if there shall be properties in the hands of the church, or any individuals of it, more than is necessary for their support after this first consecration, which is a D&C 42:55; 51:13; 82:18 (17–19); 119:1 (1–3).residue to be consecrated unto the bishop, it shall be kept to administer to those who have not, from time to time, that every man who has need may be amply supplied and receive according to his wants.

Therefore, the residue shall be kept in my D&C 42:55; 51:13.storehouse, to administer to the poor and the needy, as shall be appointed by the D&C 102:1 (1–30).high council of the church, and the bishop and his council;

And for the purpose of D&C 57:5 (5–7); 58:49 (49–51); 101:70 (68–74); 103:23 (22–24).purchasing lands for the public benefit of the church, and building houses of TG Worship.worship, and building up of the TG Zion.New Jerusalem which is hereafter to be revealed—
That my covenant people may be gathered in one in that day when I shall D&C 36:8.come to my Mal. 3:1.temple. And this I do for the salvation of my people.

And it shall come to pass, that he that sinneth and repenteth not shall be D&C 41:5; 50:8 (8–9); 64:35. TG Excommunication.cast out of the church, and shall not receive again that which he has D&C 51:5.consecrated unto the poor and the needy of my church, or in other words, unto me—
For inasmuch as ye Matt. 25:40 (34–40). TG Love.do it unto the least of these, ye do it unto me.

For it shall come to pass, that which I spake by the mouths of my prophets shall be fulfilled; for I will consecrate of the TG Treasure.riches of those who embrace my gospel among the Gentiles unto the TG Poor.poor of my people who are of the house of Israel.

And again, thou shalt not be Prov. 16:5. TG Haughtiness; Pride.proud in thy TG Hardheartedness.heart; let all thy TG Apparel; Clothing; Modesty.garments be plain, and their TG Beauty.beauty the beauty of the TG Industry.work of thine own hands;
And let all things be done in TG Cleanliness; Purification.cleanliness before me.
Thou shalt not be D&C 60:13; 68:30–32; 75:29. TG Idleness; Laziness; Welfare.idle; for he that is idle shall not eat the TG Bread.bread nor wear the garments of the TG Labor; Work, Value of.laborer.

And whosoever among you are TG Sickness.sick, and have not faith to be healed, but believe, shall be TG Health.nourished with all tenderness, with herbs and mild TG Food.food, and that not by the hand of an enemy.

And the elders of the church, two or more, shall be called, and shall pray for and TG Hands, Laying on of.lay their TG Administrations to the Sick.hands upon them in my name; and if they Rom. 14:8 (5–9); D&C 63:49.die they shall Rev. 14:13.die unto me, and if they live they shall live unto me.

Thou shalt 1 Jn. 4:16.live together in John 11:36 (35–36). TG Family, Love within; Love.love, insomuch that thou shalt Gen. 50:1; Alma 28:11 (11–12); 48:23. TG Mourning.weep for the loss of them that die, and more especially for those that have not 1 Cor. 15:19 (19–22). TG Hope.hope of a glorious resurrection.
And it shall come to pass that those that die in me shall not John 8:52 (51–52).taste of John 11:26; 1 Cor. 15:56. TG Death.death, for it shall be Job 13:15 (15–16); Rev. 14:13.sweet unto them;
And they that die not in me, wo unto them, for their death is bitter.

And again, it shall come to pass that he that hath D&C 46:19. TG Faith.faith in me to be Luke 18:42 (35–43). TG Heal.healed, and is not 2 Kgs. 20:1 (1–6); Job 7:1; Isa. 38:5; 1 Cor. 4:9; Alma 12:27 (26–28); D&C 121:25.appointed unto death, shall be TG Death, Power over.healed.
He who hath faith to see shall see.
He who hath faith to hear shall hear.
The lame who hath faith to leap shall leap.

And they who have not faith to do these things, but believe in me, have TG Initiative.power to become my TG Sons and Daughters of God.sons; and inasmuch as they break not my laws thou shalt Rom. 15:1. TG Fellowshipping.bear their infirmities.
Thou shalt TG Stewardship; Trustworthiness.stand in the place of thy stewardship.
Thou shalt not take thy brother’s Ex. 22:26.garment; thou shalt D&C 51:11.pay for that which thou shalt receive of thy brother.

And if thou D&C 82:18 (17–19); 119:1 (1–3).obtainest more than that which would be for thy support, thou shalt give it into my D&C 42:34; 51:13.storehouse, that all things may be done according to that which I have said.
Thou shalt ask, and my D&C 42:15; 45:60 (60–61).scriptures shall be given as I have appointed, and they shall be TG Scriptures, Preservation of.preserved in safety;
And it is expedient that thou shouldst hold thy peace concerning them, and Moses 1:42; 4:32.not teach them until ye have received them in full.

And I give unto you a commandment that then ye shall teach them unto all men; for they shall be D&C 124:89.taught unto D&C 1:2, 34 (34–35); 18:28 (26–28); 39:15.all TG Nations.nations, kindreds, tongues and people.

Thou shalt take the things which thou hast received, which have been given unto thee in my scriptures for a law, to be my Josh. 1:8.law to govern my TG God, Law of; Jesus Christ, Head of the Church.church;
And he that D&C 41:5. TG Salvation.doeth according to these things shall be saved, and he that doeth them not shall be Moses 5:15. TG Damnation.damned if he so continue.

If thou shalt ask, thou shalt receive D&C 59:4; 76:7; 98:12; 101:32; 121:28 (26–33). TG Revelation.revelation upon revelation, Prov. 19:2; Abr. 1:2. TG Knowledge; Learn; Testimony.knowledge upon knowledge, that thou mayest know the D&C 63:23; 71:1. TG Mysteries of Godliness.mysteries and D&C 36:2; 39:6.peaceable things—that which bringeth TG Joy.joy, that which bringeth life eternal.
Thou shalt ask, and it shall be revealed unto you in mine own due time where the D&C 57:2 (1–5).New Jerusalem shall be built.
And behold, it shall come to pass that my servants shall be sent forth to the east and to the west, to the north and to the south.

And even now, let him that goeth to the east teach them that shall be converted to flee to the D&C 45:64; 48:2.west, and this in consequence of D&C 38:29 (28–30).that which is coming on the earth, and of Ether 8:24 (22–25); D&C 5:33 (32–33); 10:6 (6, 25); 38:13, 28.secret combinations.

Behold, thou shalt observe all these things, and great shall be thy TG Reward.reward; for unto you it is given to know the Rom. 16:25; Alma 12:9; D&C 6:7 (7–11); 121:27 (25–27).mysteries of the kingdom, but unto the world it is not given to know them.
Ye shall observe the laws which ye have received and be faithful.
And ye shall hereafter receive church D&C 82:11 (11–15); 84:39; 132:4 (4–7).covenants, such as shall be sufficient to establish you, both here and in the New Jerusalem.
Therefore, he that lacketh James 1:5; D&C 1:26. TG God, Wisdom of.wisdom, let him ask of me, and I will give him liberally and upbraid him not.

Lift up your hearts and rejoice, for unto you the TG Kingdom of God, on Earth.kingdom, or in other words, the Matt. 16:19; D&C 65:2. TG Priesthood, Keys of.keys of the church have been given. Even so. Amen.
The priests and TG Priest, Aaronic Priesthood; Teacher, Aaronic Priesthood.teachers shall have their TG Stewardship.stewardships, even as the members.

And the elders or high priests who are appointed to assist the bishop as counselors in all things, are to have their families D&C 41:7.supported out of the property which is TG Consecration.consecrated to the bishop, for the good of the poor, and for other purposes, as before mentioned;
Or they are to receive a just remuneration for all their services, either a stewardship or otherwise, as may be thought best or decided by the counselors and bishop.
And the bishop, also, shall receive his support, or a just remuneration for all his services in the church.

Behold, verily I say unto you, that whatever persons among you, having put away their Matt. 5:32.companions for the cause of TG Fornication; Sexual Immorality.fornication, or in other words, if they shall testify before you in all lowliness of heart that this is the case, ye shall not cast them out from among you;

But if ye shall find that any persons have left their companions for the sake of TG Adulterer.adultery, and they themselves are the offenders, and their companions are living, they shall be TG Excommunication.cast out from among you.
And again, I say unto you, that ye shall be TG Watch.watchful and careful, with all inquiry, that ye receive none such among you if they are married;
And if they are not married, they shall repent of all their sins or ye shall not receive them.
And again, every person who belongeth to this church of Christ, shall observe to keep all the commandments and covenants of the church.

And it shall come to pass, that if any persons among you shall Luke 18:20. TG Blood, Shedding of; Murder.kill they shall be delivered up and dealt with according to the laws of the land; for remember that he hath no forgiveness; and it shall be proved according to the laws of the land.

And if any man or woman shall commit TG Adulterer.adultery, he or she shall be tried before two elders of the church, or more, and every word shall be established against him or her by two TG Witness.witnesses of the church, and not of the enemy; but if there are more than two witnesses it is better.

But he or she shall be condemned by the mouth of two witnesses; and the elders shall lay the case before the Matt. 18:17 (16–17).church, and the church shall lift up their hands against him or her, that they may be dealt with according to the D&C 64:12.law of God.
And if it can be, it is necessary that the TG Bishop.bishop be present also.
And thus ye shall do in all cases which shall come before you.
And if a man or woman shall rob, he or she shall be delivered up unto the law of the land.
And if he or she shall TG Stealing.steal, he or she shall be delivered up unto the law of the land.
And if he or she shall TG Honesty; Lying.lie, he or she shall be delivered up unto the law of the land.
And if he or she do any manner of D&C 43:11.iniquity, he or she shall be delivered up unto the law, even that of God.

And if thy TG Brotherhood and Sisterhood.brother or sister Matt. 18:15 (15–18). TG Offense.offend thee, thou shalt take him or her between him or her and thee alone; and if he or she TG Confession.confess thou shalt be TG Reconciliation.reconciled.

And if he or she confess not thou shalt deliver him or her up unto the church, not to the members, but to the elders. And it shall be done in a TG Judgment; Justice.meeting, and that not before the world.
And if thy brother or sister offend many, he or she shall be TG Chastening; Reproof.chastened before many.

And if any one offend Ezek. 5:8; 1 Tim. 5:20 (19–21).openly, he or she shall be rebuked openly, that he or she may be TG Shame.ashamed. And if he or she confess not, he or she shall be delivered up unto the law of God.

If any shall offend in secret, he or she shall be rebuked in secret, that he or she may have opportunity to confess in secret to him or her whom he or she has offended, and to God, that the church may not speak reproachfully of him or her.
And thus shall ye conduct in all things.

div.p: Revelation given through Joseph Smith the Prophet, at Kirtland, Ohio, in February 1831. At this time some members of the Church were disturbed by people making false claims as revelators. The Prophet inquired of the Lord and received this communication addressed to the elders of the Church. The first part deals with matters of Church polity; the latter part contains a warning that the elders are to give to the nations of the earth.

1–7, Revelations and commandments come only through the one appointed; 8–14, The Saints are sanctified by acting in all holiness before the Lord; 15–22, Elders are sent forth to cry repentance and prepare men for the great day of the Lord; 23–28, The Lord calls upon men by His own voice and through the forces of nature; 29–35, The Millennium and the binding of Satan will come.

chapter.verse: O hearken, ye elders of my church, and give ear to the words which I shall speak unto you.

For behold, verily, verily, I say unto you, that ye have received a commandment for a D&C 42:2 (1–93).law unto my church, through him whom I have appointed unto you to receive commandments and TG Commandments of God; God, Law of; Revelation.revelations from my hand.

And this ye shall know assuredly—that there is TG False Prophets.none other appointed unto you to receive TG Prophets, Mission of.commandments and revelations until he be taken, if he John 15:4.abide in me.

But verily, verily, I say unto you, that D&C 28:2 (1–3, 11–13).none else shall be appointed unto this gift except it be through him; for if it be taken from him he shall not have power except to appoint another in his stead.
And this shall be a law unto you, that ye D&C 28:5 (3–8).receive not the TG False Doctrine.teachings of any that shall come before you as revelations or commandments;
And this I give unto you that you may not be D&C 28:11; 46:7. TG Deceit.deceived, that you may know they are not of me.

For verily I say unto you, that he that is TG Authority; Called of God.ordained of me shall come in at the Matt. 7:13; 2 Ne. 9:41; 31:9 (9, 17–18); 3 Ne. 14:14 (13–14); D&C 22:4.gate and be ordained as I have told you before, to teach those TG Scriptures to Come Forth.revelations which you have received and shall receive through him whom I have appointed.

And now, behold, I give unto you a TG Commandments of God.commandment, that when ye are TG Assembly for Worship; Meetings.assembled together ye shall D&C 88:77 (77–79).instruct and TG Edification.edify each other, that ye may know D&C 82:9; JS—H 1:12.how to act and direct my church, how to act upon the points of my law and commandments, which I have given.
And thus ye shall become instructed in the law of my church, and be TG Sanctification.sanctified by that which ye have received, and ye shall bind yourselves to act in all holiness before me—
That inasmuch as ye do this, glory shall be Alma 12:10 (9–11).added to the kingdom which ye have received. Inasmuch as ye do it not, it shall be Mark 4:25.taken, even that which ye have received.
1 Cor. 5:7.Purge ye out the D&C 42:87. TG Sin.iniquity which is among you; sanctify yourselves before me;
And if ye desire the glories of the kingdom, TG Sustaining Church Leaders.appoint ye my servant Joseph Smith, Jun., and uphold him before me by the prayer of faith.

And again, I say unto you, that if ye desire the TG Mysteries of Godliness.mysteries of the kingdom, provide for him food and raiment, and whatsoever thing he needeth to accomplish the work wherewith I have commanded him;
And if ye do it not he shall remain unto them that have received him, that I may reserve unto myself a TG Purity.pure TG Millennium, Preparing a People for.people before me.

Again I say, hearken ye elders of my TG Jesus Christ, Head of the Church.church, whom I have appointed: Ye are not sent forth to be 1 Jn. 2:27. TG Teaching.taught, but to D&C 50:13. TG Missionary Work; Mission of Latter-day Saints; Priesthood, Ordination.teach the children of men the things which I have put into your hands by the power of my TG Teaching with the Spirit.Spirit;

And ye are to be TG Inspiration; Teachable.taught from on high. Josh. 3:5. TG Sanctification.Sanctify yourselves and ye shall be Luke 24:49; D&C 38:32; 39:15; 95:8 (8–9); 110:9 (8–10).endowed with power, that ye may give even as I have spoken.
Hearken ye, for, behold, the Mal. 4:5; D&C 2:1; 34:8 (6–9).great D&C 5:19 (19–20); 29:8; 35:11 (11–16).day of the Lord is nigh at hand.

For the day cometh that the Lord shall utter his Joel 2:11; D&C 35:21; 88:90; 133:50 (50–52).voice out of heaven; the heavens shall Joel 2:10; 3:16; D&C 45:48. TG Last Days.shake and the earth shall D&C 45:33 (33, 48); 84:118; 88:87 (87, 90).tremble, and the D&C 29:13; 45:45.trump of God shall sound both long and loud, and shall say to the sleeping nations: Ye saints TG Resurrection.arise and live; ye sinners Rev. 20:13 (12–13); Alma 11:41; D&C 76:85; 88:100 (100–101).stay and Dan. 12:2; Morm. 9:13 (13–14).sleep until I shall call again.
Wherefore gird up your loins lest ye be found among the wicked.
Lift up your voices and spare not. Call upon the nations to repent, both old and young, both 1 Cor. 12:13.bond and free, saying: Prepare yourselves for the great day of the Lord;

For if I, who am a man, do lift up my voice and call upon you to repent, and ye TG Hate.hate me, what will ye say when the TG Day of the Lord.day cometh when the 2 Ne. 27:2; D&C 88:90.thunders shall utter their voices from the ends of the earth, speaking to the ears of all that live, saying—Repent, and prepare for the great day of the Lord?

Yea, and again, when the Amos 4:6 (6–10).lightnings shall streak forth from the east unto the west, and shall utter forth their voices unto all that live, and make the ears of all tingle that hear, saying these words—Repent ye, for the great day of the Lord is come?
And again, the Lord shall utter his voice out of heaven, saying: Hearken, O ye nations of the earth, and hear the words of that God who Deut. 32:6; 1 Ne. 2:12.made you.
O, ye nations of the earth, how often would I have gathered you together as a Matt. 23:37; Luke 13:34; 3 Ne. 10:6 (4–6).hen gathereth her chickens under her wings, but ye TG Rebellion.would not!

How oft have I Lev. 26:16; Ezek. 26:6; 1 Ne. 21:26 (25–26); Mosiah 7:29; 11:22 (20–22); Hel. 12:3 (2–4).called upon you by the mouth of my Matt. 23:34. TG Prophets, Mission of.servants, and by the D&C 7:6; 130:5.ministering of angels, and by mine own voice, and by the voice of Rev. 16:18; 2 Ne. 6:15. TG Nature, Earth.thunderings, and by the voice of lightnings, and by the voice of tempests, and by the voice of earthquakes, and great hailstorms, and by the voice of Jer. 24:10; Joel 1:10; Amos 4:6; D&C 87:6 (1–8); JS—M 1:29. TG Drought; Famine.famines and pestilences of every kind, and by the great sound of a Ex. 19:19 (13, 16, 19).trump, and by the voice of judgment, and by the voice of TG Mercy.mercy all the day long, and by the voice of glory and honor and the TG Treasure.riches of eternal life, and would have saved you with an TG Eternal Life; Immortality; Salvation.everlasting salvation, but ye would not!
Behold, the day has come, when the Lam. 4:21.cup of the Ezek. 21:31. TG God, Indignation of.wrath of mine indignation is full.
Behold, verily I say unto you, that these are the words of the Lord your God.
Wherefore, labor ye, Jacob 5:71 (71–75); D&C 27:13; 33:3. TG Vineyard of the Lord.labor ye in my vineyard for the last time—for the last time call upon the inhabitants of the earth.

For in mine own due time will I TG Jesus Christ, Second Coming.come upon the earth in TG Judgment, the Last.judgment, and my people shall be Rev. 14:4 (2–5).redeemed and shall TG Jesus Christ, Millennial Reign.reign with me on earth.
For the great TG Millennium.Millennium, of which I have spoken by the mouth of my servants, shall come.

For 1 Ne. 22:26. TG Devil.Satan shall be D&C 45:55; 84:100; 88:110 (110–12); 101:28.bound, and when he is loosed again he shall only reign for a Rev. 20:3 (3–10); Jacob 5:77 (76–77); D&C 29:22; 88:111 (110–12).little season, and then cometh the Matt. 24:14. TG World, End of.end of the earth.

And he that liveth in TG Righteousness.righteousness shall be 1 Cor. 15:51 (51–52); D&C 63:51; 88:28 (20, 28); 101:31. TG Resurrection.changed in the twinkling of an eye, and the earth shall pass away so as by Matt. 3:12.fire.

And the wicked shall go away into unquenchable Dan. 7:11; D&C 29:28 (21, 26–30). TG Hell.fire, and their end no man knoweth on earth, nor ever shall know, until they come before me in TG Jesus Christ, Judge.judgment.

Hearken ye to these words. Behold, I am Jesus Christ, the TG Jesus Christ, Savior.Savior of the world. Isa. 45:22; D&C 6:36; 11:26; JS—M 1:37. Be Rom. 12:3; D&C 18:21.sober. Keep all my commandments. Even so. Amen.

div.p: Revelation given to Joseph Smith the Prophet and Sidney Rigdon, at Kirtland, Ohio, in the latter part of February 1831. In compliance with the requirement herein set forth, the Church appointed a conference to be held early in the month of June following.
1–3, Elders are to assemble in conference; 4–6, They are to organize according to the laws of the land and to care for the poor.

chapter.verse: Behold, thus saith the Lord unto you my servants, it is expedient in me that the elders of my church should be TG Assembly for Worship; Meetings.called together, from the east and from the west, and from the north and from the south, by letter or some other way.
And it shall come to pass, that inasmuch as they are faithful, and exercise faith in me, I will pour out my Acts 2:17.Spirit upon them in the day that they assemble themselves together.
And it shall come to pass that they shall go forth into the regions round about, and TG Preaching.preach repentance unto the people.

And many shall be TG Conversion.converted, insomuch that ye shall obtain TG Authority; Church Organization.power to organize yourselves 1 Pet. 2:13 (13–14); D&C 51:6; 98:5 (5–7); 109:54.according to the laws of man;

That your Lev. 26:7 (1–13); 2 Ne. 4:33 (16–35).enemies may not have power over you; that you may be preserved in all things; that you may be enabled to keep my laws; that every bond may be broken wherewith the enemy seeketh to destroy my people.

Behold, I say unto you, that ye must James 1:27. TG Compassion; Service; Welfare.visit the poor and the needy and administer to their relief, that they may be kept until all things may be done according to my law which ye have received. Amen.

div.p: Revelation given through Joseph Smith the Prophet to the Church, at Kirtland, Ohio, March 7, 1831. Prefacing the record of this revelation, Joseph Smith’s history states that “at this age of the Church … many false reports … and foolish stories, were published … and circulated, … to prevent people from investigating the work, or embracing the faith. … But to the joy of the Saints, … I received the following.”

1–5, Christ is our advocate with the Father; 6–10, The gospel is a messenger to prepare the way before the Lord; 11–15, Enoch and his brethren were received by the Lord unto Himself; 16–23, Christ revealed signs of His coming as given on the Mount of Olives; 24–38, The gospel will be restored, the times of the Gentiles will be fulfilled, and a desolating sickness will cover the land; 39–47, Signs, wonders, and the Resurrection are to attend the Second Coming; 48–53, Christ will stand on the Mount of Olives, and the Jews will see the wounds in His hands and feet; 54–59, The Lord will reign during the Millennium; 60–62, The Prophet is instructed to begin the translation of the New Testament, through which important information will be made known; 63–75, The Saints are commanded to gather and build the New Jerusalem, to which people from all nations will come.

Who were JST Gen. 14:30–34 (Bible Appendix); D&C 38:4; Moses 7:21.separated from the earth, and were received unto myself—a Heb. 11:16; D&C 84:100; Moses 7:63 (62–64). And the TG Earth, Destiny of.earth shall be given unto them for an Isa. 29:19; Matt. 5:5; Col. 1:12; 2 Ne. 9:18; D&C 38:20 (16–20); 56:20.inheritance; and they shall Gen. 1:22 (20–25); Jer. 30:19.multiply and wax strong, and their TG Children.children shall D&C 63:51; 101:30 (29–31).grow up without TG Sin.sin unto TG Salvation; Salvation of Little Children.salvation.

And now, behold, I say unto you, it shall not be given unto you to know any further concerning this chapter, until the See an excerpt in the Pearl of Great Price, in Joseph Smith—Matthew. Wherefore I give unto you that ye may now translate it, that ye may be prepared for the things to come.

And with one heart and with one mind, gather up your riches that ye may D&C 63:27.purchase an inheritance which shall hereafter be appointed unto you.

And now I say unto you, keep these things from going abroad unto the world until it is expedient in me, that ye may accomplish this work in the eyes of the people, and in the eyes of your enemies, that they may not know your works until ye have accomplished the thing which I have commanded you;
That when they shall know it, that they may consider these things.
For when the Lord shall appear he shall be Zeph. 2:11.terrible unto them, that fear may seize upon them, and they shall stand afar off and tremble.
And all nations shall be afraid because of the terror of the Lord, and the power of his might. Even so. Amen.

div.p: Revelation given through Joseph Smith the Prophet to the Church, at Kirtland, Ohio, March 8, 1831. In this early time of the Church, a unified pattern for the conducting of Church services had not yet developed. However, a custom of admitting only members and earnest investigators to the sacrament meetings and other assemblies of the Church had become somewhat general. This revelation expresses the will of the Lord relative to governing and conducting meetings and His direction on seeking and discerning the gifts of the Spirit.

1–2, Elders are to conduct meetings as guided by the Holy Spirit; 3–6, Truth seekers should not be excluded from sacramental services; 7–12, Ask of God and seek the gifts of the Spirit; 13–26, An enumeration of some of these gifts is given; 27–33, Church leaders are given power to discern the gifts of the Spirit.

chapter.verse: Hearken, O ye people of my church; for verily I say unto you that these things were spoken unto you for your Deut. 10:13 (12–13).profit and learning.

But notwithstanding those things which are written, it always has been given to the Lev. 9:1; Alma 6:1.elders of my church from the beginning, and ever shall be, to Moro. 6:9; D&C 20:45.conduct all meetings as they are directed and guided by the Holy Spirit.
Nevertheless ye are commanded never to 3 Ne. 18:22 (22–34).cast any one out from your public TG Church; Fellowshipping; Meetings.meetings, which are held before the world.

Ye are also commanded not to cast any one who belongeth to the church out of your sacrament meetings; nevertheless, if any have trespassed, let him 3 Ne. 12:24 (23–26).not TG Reconciliation; Sacrament.partake until he makes reconciliation.
And again I say unto you, ye shall not cast any out of your sacrament meetings who are earnestly TG Missionary Work.seeking the kingdom—I speak this concerning those who are not of the church.

And again I say unto you, concerning your IE for confirmation of those recently baptized, commonly done now in sacrament meeting.confirmation meetings, that if there be any that are not of the church, that are earnestly seeking after the kingdom, ye shall not cast them out.

But ye are commanded in all things to James 1:5 (5–6); D&C 6:11; 88:62 (62–65); 102:23. TG Problem-Solving.ask of God, who giveth liberally; and that which the Spirit testifies unto you even so I would that ye should do in all TG Holiness.holiness of heart, walking uprightly before me, TG Meditation; Prayer.considering the end of your salvation, doing all things with prayer and Ps. 34:1 (1–3); 69:30 (30–31); Alma 34:38. TG Thanksgiving.thanksgiving, that ye may not be 1 Tim. 4:1 (1–4); D&C 28:11; 43:6 (5–7).seduced by evil TG Spirits, Evil or Unclean.spirits, or doctrines of devils, or the Col. 2:22 (18–22); Titus 1:14; D&C 3:6 (6–7); 45:29; JS—H 1:19.commandments of men; for some are of men, and others of devils.
Wherefore, beware lest ye are deceived; and that ye may not be deceived 1 Cor. 12:31; D&C 11:10.seek ye earnestly the best gifts, always remembering for what they are given;

For verily I say unto you, they are given for the benefit of those who love me and keep all my commandments, and him that seeketh so to do; that all may be benefited that seek or that ask of me, that ask and not for a TG Sign Seekers.sign that they may James 4:3.consume it upon their lusts.
And again, verily I say unto you, I would that ye should always remember, and always retain in your TG Mind.minds what those 1 Cor. 14:12.gifts are, that are given unto the church.
For all have not every Rom. 1:11. TG Holy Ghost, Gifts of.gift given unto them; for there are many gifts, and to every man is given a gift by the Spirit of God.
To some is given one, and to some is given another, that all may be profited thereby.
To some it is given by the TG Holy Ghost, Source of Testimony.Holy Ghost to know that Jesus Christ is the Son of God, and that he was crucified for the sins of the world.
To others it is given to Rom. 10:10 (4–11); Mosiah 26:15 (15–16); Alma 19:9; 56:48 (47–48); 3 Ne. 12:2.believe on their words, that they also might have eternal life if they continue faithful.

And again, to some it is given by the Holy Ghost to know the Moro. 10:8.differences of administration, as it will be pleasing unto the same Lord, according as the Lord will, suiting his Gen. 32:10; 1 Ne. 1:20; Alma 34:38.mercies according to the conditions of the children of men.

And again, it is given by the Holy Ghost to some to know the diversities of operations, whether they be of God, that the manifestations of the 1 Cor. 12:7 (3–8).Spirit may be given to every man to profit withal.
And again, verily I say unto you, to some is given, by the Spirit of God, the word of 1 Kgs. 5:12; Moro. 10:9 (9–10).wisdom.
To another is given the word of TG Education; Knowledge.knowledge, that all may be taught to be wise and to have knowledge.
And again, to some it is given to have Mark 5:34 (34–36); Hel. 15:9 (9–10); D&C 42:48 (48–52). TG Faith.faith to be healed;
And to others it is given to have faith to TG Heal.heal.
And again, to some is given the working of TG Miracle.miracles;
And to others it is given to TG Prophecy.prophesy;
And to others the Acts 16:18 (16–18); Moses 1:15 (13–15).discerning of spirits.
And again, it is given to some to speak with TG Language.tongues;
And to another is given the interpretation of tongues.
And all these TG God, Gifts of.gifts come from God, for the benefit of the TG Man, a Spirit Child of Heavenly Father; Sons and Daughters of God.children of God.

And unto the TG Bishop.bishop of the church, and unto such as God shall appoint and ordain to watch over the church and to be elders unto the church, are to have it given unto them to TG Discernment, Spiritual.discern all those gifts lest there shall be any among you professing and yet be not of God.
And it shall come to pass that he that asketh in Ezek. 36:27; Rom. 8:26 (26–27); D&C 88:65 (64–65).Spirit shall receive in Spirit;
That unto some it may be given to have all those gifts, that there may be a head, in order that every member may be profited thereby.
He that Hel. 10:5; 3 Ne. 19:24; D&C 50:29. TG Holy Ghost, Mission of.asketh in the James 4:3.Spirit asketh according to the TG God, Will of.will of God; wherefore it is done even as he asketh.
And again, I say unto you, all things must be done in the name of Christ, whatsoever you do in the Spirit;
And ye must give 1 Chr. 16:8 (7–36); 1 Thes. 1:2; Alma 37:37; D&C 59:7. TG Thanksgiving.thanks unto God in the Spirit for whatsoever blessing ye are blessed with.
And ye must practice TG Holiness; Virtue.virtue and holiness before me continually. Even so. Amen.

div.p: Revelation given through Joseph Smith the Prophet, at Kirtland, Ohio, March 8, 1831. John Whitmer, who had already served as a clerk to the Prophet, initially hesitated when he was asked to serve as the Church historian and recorder, replacing Oliver Cowdery. He wrote, “I would rather not do it but observed that the will of the Lord be done, and if he desires it, I desire that he would manifest it through Joseph the Seer.” After Joseph Smith received this revelation, John Whitmer accepted and served in his appointed office.
1–4, John Whitmer is designated to keep the history of the Church and to write for the Prophet.

chapter.verse: Behold, it is expedient in me that my servant John should write and keep a regular D&C 21:1; 69:3 (3–8); 85:1.history, and assist you, my servant Joseph, in transcribing all things which shall be given you, until he is called to further duties.
Again, verily I say unto you that he can also TG Preaching.lift up his voice in meetings, whenever it shall be expedient.
And again, I say unto you that it shall be appointed unto him to keep the church TG Record Keeping.record and history continually; for Oliver Cowdery I have appointed to another office.
Wherefore, it shall be given him, inasmuch as he is faithful, by the TG Holy Ghost, Comforter.Comforter, to write these things. Even so. Amen.

div.p: Revelation given through Joseph Smith the Prophet, at Kirtland, Ohio, March 10, 1831. The Prophet had inquired of the Lord as to the mode of procedure in procuring lands for the settlement of the Saints. This was an important matter in view of the migration of members of the Church from the eastern United States, in obedience to the Lord’s command that they should assemble in Ohio (see sections 37:1–3; 45:64).
1–3, The Saints in Ohio are to share their lands with their brethren; 4–6, The Saints are to purchase lands, build a city, and follow the counsel of their presiding officers.

chapter.verse: It is necessary that ye should remain for the present time in your places of abode, as it shall be suitable to your circumstances.
And inasmuch as ye have lands, ye shall TG Welfare.impart to the D&C 42:64; 45:64.eastern brethren;

And inasmuch as ye have not lands, let them buy for the present time in those regions round about, as seemeth them good, for it must needs be necessary that they have places to live for the present time.

It must needs be necessary that ye TG Family, Managing Finances in.save all the money that ye can, and that ye obtain all that ye can in righteousness, that in time ye may be enabled to D&C 57:4.purchase D&C 57:8.land for an D&C 42:9 (9, 35, 62); 45:66 (66–71); 64:30.inheritance, even the city.

The D&C 51:16.place is not yet to be D&C 57:2 (1–3).revealed; but after your brethren come from the east there are to be certain men appointed, and to them it shall be given to know the place, or to them it shall be revealed.

And they shall be appointed to TG Jerusalem, New; Zion.purchase the lands, and to make a commencement to lay the foundation of the city; and then shall ye begin to be gathered with your families, every man according to his Num. 1:2; Mosiah 6:3; Ether 1:41.family, according to his circumstances, and as is appointed to him by the presidency and the bishop of the church, according to the laws and commandments which ye have received, and which ye shall hereafter receive. Even so. Amen.

div.p: Revelation given through Joseph Smith the Prophet to Sidney Rigdon, Parley P. Pratt, and Leman Copley, at Kirtland, Ohio, May 7, 1831. Leman Copley had embraced the gospel but still held to some of the teachings of the Shakers (United Society of Believers in Christ’s Second Appearing), to which he had formerly belonged. Some of the beliefs of the Shakers were that Christ’s Second Coming had already occurred and that He had appeared in the form of a woman, Ann Lee. They did not consider baptism by water essential. They rejected marriage and believed in a life of total celibacy. Some Shakers also forbade the eating of meat. In prefacing this revelation, Joseph Smith’s history states, “In order to have [a] more perfect understanding on the subject, I inquired of the Lord, and received the following.” The revelation refutes some of the basic concepts of the Shaker group. The aforementioned brethren took a copy of the revelation to the Shaker community (near Cleveland, Ohio) and read it to them in its entirety, but it was rejected.

1–7, The day and hour of Christ’s coming will remain unknown until He comes; 8–14, Men must repent, believe the gospel, and obey the ordinances to gain salvation; 15–16, Marriage is ordained of God; 17–21, The eating of meat is approved; 22–28, Zion will flourish and the Lamanites blossom as the rose before the Second Coming.

chapter.verse: Hearken unto my word, my servants Sidney, and Parley, and Leman; for behold, verily I say unto you, that I give unto you a commandment that you shall go and TG Preaching.preach my gospel which ye have received, even as ye have received it, unto the Shakers.
Behold, I say unto you, that they desire to know the truth in part, but not all, for they are not Acts 8:21.right before me and must needs repent.
Wherefore, I send you, my servants Sidney and Parley, to preach the gospel unto them.

And my servant Leman shall be ordained unto this work, that he may reason with them, not according to that which he has received of them, but according to that which shall be TG Gospel; Truth.taught him by you my servants; and by so doing I will bless him, otherwise he shall not prosper.

Thus saith the Lord; for I am God, and have John 3:17 (16–17); D&C 132:24 (24, 59). TG Jesus Christ, Authority of.sent mine TG Jesus Christ, Divine Sonship.Only Begotten Son into the world for the TG Jesus Christ, Redeemer; Redemption.redemption of the world, and have decreed that he that receiveth him shall be saved, and he that receiveth him not shall be TG Damnation.damned—

And they have done unto the TG Jesus Christ, Son of Man.Son of Man even as they listed; and he has taken his power on the Acts 7:56; D&C 76:20 (20–23); 104:7.right hand of his TG Jesus Christ, Glory of.glory, and now reigneth in the heavens, and will reign till he descends on the earth to put all enemies Ps. 66:3; D&C 76:61.under his feet, which time is nigh at hand—

I, the Lord God, have spoken it; but the hour and the Matt. 24:36; 25:13; Mark 13:32; Rev. 16:15 (15–16); D&C 133:11; JS—M 1:40.day no man knoweth, neither the angels in heaven, nor shall they know until he comes.

Wherefore, I will that all men shall repent, for all are under Gal. 3:22; Mosiah 16:3.sin, except those which I have Rom. 11:4.reserved unto myself, Ex. 22:31; Heb. 13:2; W of M 1:17; Alma 13:26; D&C 107:29.holy men that ye know not of.

Wherefore, I say unto you that I have sent unto you mine everlasting Ps. 74:20; Isa. 59:21 (20–21); Rom. 11:27; Heb. 10:16 (16–17). TG New and Everlasting Covenant.covenant, even that which was from the beginning.

And that which I have promised I have so fulfilled, and the Zech. 2:11 (10–12); D&C 45:69 (66–69); 97:19 (18–21).nations of the earth shall Isa. 60:14.bow to it; and, if not of themselves, they shall come down, for that which is now exalted of itself shall be laid Matt. 23:12.low of power.
Wherefore, I give unto you a commandment that ye TG Missionary Work.go among this people, and say unto them, like unto mine apostle of old, whose name was Acts 2:38 (37–38).Peter:
TG Baptism, Qualifications for.Believe on the name of the Lord Jesus, who was on the earth, and is to come, the beginning and the end;
TG Repent.Repent and be baptized in the name of Jesus Christ, according to the holy commandment, for the remission of sins;
And whoso doeth this shall receive the TG Holy Ghost, Gift of.gift of the Holy Ghost, by the laying on of the TG Hands, Laying on of.hands of the elders of the church.

And again, verily I say unto you, that whoso 1 Tim. 4:3.forbiddeth to marry is not ordained of God, for Gen. 2:24 (23–24); D&C 42:22; Moses 3:24 (23–24); Abr. 5:18 (17–18). TG Marriage, Celestial; Marriage, Marry.marriage is ordained of God unto man.

Wherefore, it is lawful that he should have one TG Marriage, Husbands; Marriage, Wives.wife, and they twain shall be TG Family, Love within.one flesh, and all this that the TG Earth, Purpose of.earth might answer the end of its creation;
And that it might be filled with the measure of man, according to his TG Creation; Foreordination.creation TG Man, Antemortal Existence of.before the world was made.
And whoso IE biddeth to abstain; see v. 19 and Gen. 9:3–4.forbiddeth to TG Abstain.abstain from TG Food; Meat; Word of Wisdom.meats, that man should not eat the same, is not ordained of God;

For, behold, the Gen. 1:26; D&C 89:12.beasts of the field and the fowls of the air, and that which cometh of the earth, is 1 Tim. 4:3. TG Food.ordained for the use of man for food and for TG Clothing.raiment, and that he might have in abundance.
But it is not given that one man should Acts 4:32; D&C 51:3; 70:14; 78:6 (5–6). TG Consecration; Covet.possess that which is above another, wherefore the TG World.world lieth in TG Sin.sin.

And wo be unto man that TG Life, Sanctity of. JST Gen. 9:11 And surely, blood shall not be shed, only for meat, to save your lives; and the blood of every beast will I require at your hands.sheddeth blood or that TG Cruelty; Waste.wasteth TG Food; Meat.flesh and hath no need.
And again, verily I say unto you, that the Son of Man Matt. 24:23 (23–27). TG Jesus Christ, Second Coming.cometh not in the form of a woman, neither of a man traveling on the earth.

Wherefore, be not Matt. 24:4 (4–5).deceived, but continue in steadfastness, 2 Pet. 3:12; D&C 45:39.looking forth for the heavens to be D&C 21:6; 45:48 (22, 48).shaken, and the earth to tremble and to reel to and fro as a drunken man, and for the Isa. 40:4; D&C 109:74; 133:22.valleys to be exalted, and for the Micah 1:4. TG Earth, Renewal of.mountains to be made low, and for the rough places to become smooth—and all this when the angel shall sound his Isa. 27:13; Matt. 24:31.trumpet.

But before the great day of the Lord shall come, 3 Ne. 5:21 (21–26); D&C 52:2 (1–3).Jacob shall flourish in the wilderness, and the Lamanites shall Isa. 35:1 (1–2); 2 Ne. 30:6; 3 Ne. 21:25 (22–25); D&C 3:20; 30:6; 109:65.blossom as the rose.
Zion shall D&C 35:24; 39:13; 117:7 (7–8).flourish upon the Gen. 49:26; 2 Ne. 12:2 (2–3).hills and rejoice upon the mountains, and shall be assembled together unto the place which I have appointed.
Behold, I say unto you, go forth as I have commanded you; repent of all your sins; D&C 88:63 (62–64).ask and ye shall receive; knock and it shall be opened unto you.
Behold, I will go before you and be your Isa. 52:12.rearward; and I will be in your Matt. 18:20.midst, and you shall not be Ps. 22:5; 1 Pet. 2:6; D&C 84:116.confounded.
Behold, I am Jesus Christ, and I come D&C 1:12.quickly. Even so. Amen.

div.p: Revelation given through Joseph Smith the Prophet, at Kirtland, Ohio, May 9, 1831. Joseph Smith’s history states that some of the elders did not understand the manifestations of different spirits abroad in the earth and that this revelation was given in response to his special inquiry on the matter. So-called spiritual phenomena were not uncommon among the members, some of whom claimed to be receiving visions and revelations.

1–5, Many false spirits are abroad in the earth; 6–9, Wo unto the hypocrites and those who are cut off from the Church; 10–14, Elders are to preach the gospel by the Spirit; 15–22, Both preachers and hearers need to be enlightened by the Spirit; 23–25, That which doth not edify is not of God; 26–28, The faithful are possessors of all things; 29–36, The prayers of the purified are answered; 37–46, Christ is the Good Shepherd and the Stone of Israel.

chapter.verse: Hearken, O ye elders of my church, and give ear to the Josh. 3:10; Jer. 23:36.voice of the living God; and attend to the words of wisdom which shall be given unto you, according as ye have asked and are agreed as touching the church, and the Rev. 16:14. TG Sorcery.spirits which have gone abroad in the earth.
Behold, verily I say unto you, that there are many spirits which are false TG False Doctrine; Spirits, Evil or Unclean.spirits, which have gone forth in the earth, deceiving the world.
And also Luke 22:31; 2 Ne. 2:18 (17–18); 3 Ne. 18:18; D&C 10:22 (22–27). TG Devil.Satan hath sought to deceive you, that he might overthrow you.

Behold, I, the Lord, have looked upon you, and have seen D&C 1:30; 20:32 (32–34); 28:11 (11–12).abominations in the church that D&C 41:1; 56:1; 112:26. TG Jesus Christ, Taking the Name of.profess my name.
But blessed are they who are faithful and TG Adversity; Steadfastness.endure, whether in life or in death, for they shall inherit eternal life.
But wo unto them that are TG Deceit.deceivers and hypocrites, for, thus saith the Lord, I will bring them to judgment.

Behold, verily I say unto you, there are Prov. 11:9 (5–11).hypocrites among you, who have deceived some, which has given the TG Devil.adversary Mosiah 27:9 (8–9); D&C 93:39 (37, 39).power; but behold IE those who have been deceived.such shall be reclaimed;

But the TG Hypocrisy.hypocrites shall be detected and shall be D&C 1:14; 41:1 (1, 5); 42:37; 56:3 (1, 3–4); 64:35. TG Excommunication.cut off, either in life or in death, even as I will; and wo unto them who are cut off from my church, for the same are overcome of the world.
Wherefore, let every man beware lest he do that which is not in truth and righteousness before me.
And now come, saith the Lord, by the Spirit, unto the elders of his church, and let us Isa. 1:18; 41:1; D&C 45:10.reason together, that ye may understand;
Let us reason even as a man reasoneth one with another face to face.
Now, when a man reasoneth he is understood of man, because he reasoneth as a man; even so will I, the Lord, reason with you that you may Ps. 119:27; D&C 1:24.understand.
Wherefore, I the Lord ask you this question—unto what were ye TG Priesthood, Ordination.ordained?
To preach my gospel by the D&C 43:15. TG Teaching with the Spirit.Spirit, even the TG Holy Ghost, Comforter.Comforter which was sent forth to teach the truth.
And then received ye 1 Cor. 2:12. TG Discernment, Spiritual.spirits which ye could not understand, and received them to be of God; and in this are ye justified?
Behold ye shall answer this question yourselves; nevertheless, I will be Ps. 67:1.merciful unto you; he that is weak among you hereafter shall be made 2 Cor. 12:10. TG Strength.strong.

Verily I say unto you, he that is ordained of me and sent forth to TG Missionary Work; Priesthood, Magnifying Callings within.preach the word of truth by the Comforter, in the Spirit of truth, doth he TG Holy Ghost, Mission of.preach it by the Spirit of truth or some other way?
And if it be by some other way it is not of God.
And again, he that receiveth the word of truth, doth he receive it by the Spirit of truth or some other way?
If it be some other way it is not of God.
Therefore, why is it that ye cannot understand and know, that he that receiveth the word by the TG Truth.Spirit of truth receiveth it as it is preached by the Spirit of truth?
Wherefore, he that preacheth and he that receiveth, understand one another, and both are TG Edification.edified and Neh. 8:12; John 4:36; D&C 18:16 (13–16). TG Joy.rejoice together.
And that which doth not 1 Cor. 14:26.edify is not of God, and is TG Darkness, Spiritual.darkness.

That which is of God is Eccl. 8:1; 1 Jn. 2:8; Moro. 7:18 (14–19); D&C 67:9; 84:45 (45–47); 88:49 (40–41, 49). TG Light of Christ.light; and he that TG Learn; Teachable.receiveth Ps. 97:11; Dan. 2:21. TG Children of Light.light, and John 15:4 (4–5, 10).continueth in God, receiveth more Isa. 28:13 (9–13); 2 Ne. 28:30. TG Light [noun]; Man, Potential to Become like Heavenly Father; Perfection.light; and that light groweth brighter and brighter until the perfect day.
And again, verily I say unto you, and I say it that you may know the John 8:32.truth, that you may chase darkness from among you;

He that is TG Leadership.ordained of God and sent forth, the same is appointed to be the Luke 22:24 (24–30).greatest, notwithstanding he is the Matt. 11:11; Luke 7:28.least and the Mark 10:43 (43–44). TG Self-Sacrifice; Servant; Service.servant of all.

Wherefore, he is possessor of all things; for all things are Dan. 7:14 (13–14); Matt. 28:18; John 3:35; D&C 63:59; 76:55 (5–10, 53–60).subject unto him, both in heaven and on the earth, the life and the light, the Spirit and the TG Priesthood, Power of.power, sent forth by the will of the Father through Jesus Christ, his Son.
But no man is possessor of D&C 76:55 (55, 59).all things except he be TG Man, New, Spiritually Reborn; Purity.purified and 1 Jn. 1:7.cleansed from all sin.

And if ye are Neh. 12:30; 3 Ne. 8:1; 19:28 (28–29); D&C 29:3; 88:74 (74–75).purified and cleansed from all TG Sin.sin, ye shall Hel. 10:5; D&C 46:30.ask whatsoever you will in the name of Jesus and it shall be done.
But know this, it shall be given you what you shall TG Prayer.ask; and as ye are appointed to the TG Authority.head, the spirits shall be subject unto you.

Wherefore, it shall come to pass, that if you behold a Luke 11:24 (24–26); 1 Jn. 4:1 (1–6). TG Spirits, Evil or Unclean.spirit manifested that you cannot understand, and you receive not that spirit, ye shall ask of the Father in the name of Jesus; and if he give not unto you that spirit, then you may know that it is not of God.
And it shall be given unto you, Matt. 10:1.power over that spirit; and you shall proclaim against that spirit with a loud voice that it is 1 Jn. 4:3 (1–3).not of God—
Not with Jude 1:9.railing accusation, that ye be not overcome, neither with Luke 10:20 (17–20); D&C 84:73; 105:24. TG Boast.boasting nor rejoicing, lest you be seized therewith.
He that receiveth of God, let him TG Ingratitude; Thanksgiving.account it of God; and let him rejoice that he is accounted of God worthy to receive.

And by giving heed and doing these things which ye have received, and which ye shall hereafter receive—and the D&C 45:1; 61:37. TG Kingdom of God, on Earth.kingdom is given D&C 6:4; 35:27.you of the Father, and TG Initiative.power to 1 Jn. 4:4.overcome all things which are not ordained of him—
And behold, verily I say unto you, blessed are you who are now hearing these words of mine from the mouth of my servant, for your sins are TG Forgive.forgiven you.

Let my servant Joseph Wakefield, in whom I am well pleased, and my servant D&C 32:1; 52:26; 97:3; 103:30 (30–37).Parley P. Pratt go forth among the churches and strengthen them by the word of TG Preaching.exhortation;

And also my servant John Corrill, or as many of my servants as are ordained unto this office, and let them labor in the TG Vineyard of the Lord.vineyard; and let no man hinder them doing that which I have appointed unto them—
Wherefore, in this thing my servant D&C 42:10; 51:1 (1–18).Edward Partridge is not justified; nevertheless let him repent and he shall be forgiven.

Behold, ye are little children and ye cannot John 16:12; 3 Ne. 17:2 (2–4); D&C 78:18 (17–18).bear all things now; ye must 1 Cor. 3:2 (2–3); Heb. 5:12 (11–14); D&C 19:22.grow in TG Grace; Knowledge; Truth.grace and in the knowledge of the truth.

John 14:1 (1–3); 1 Jn. 2:1–13; 4:18 (7–21).Fear not, little TG Sons and Daughters of God.children, for you are mine, and I have John 16:33.overcome the world, and you are of them that my Father hath John 6:37; 10:29 (27–29); 17:2 (2–12); 3 Ne. 15:24; D&C 27:14; 84:63.given me;
And none of them that my Father hath given me shall be John 17:12.lost.
And the Father and I are TG Jesus Christ, Relationships with the Father; Unity.one. I am John 14:11.in the Father and the Father in me; and inasmuch as ye have received me, ye are in me and I in you.

Wherefore, I am in your midst, and I am the Ezra 3:11; Alma 5:40.good TG Jesus Christ, Good Shepherd; Shepherd.shepherd, and the Gen. 49:24. TG Cornerstone; Jesus Christ, Prophecies about.stone of Israel. He that buildeth upon this 1 Pet. 2:4 (4–8). TG Rock.rock shall never 2 Pet. 1:10; Hel. 5:12. TG Apostasy of Individuals.fall.
And the TG Day of the Lord.day cometh that you shall hear my voice and D&C 67:10. TG God, Privilege of Seeing.see me, and Acts 7:56.know that I am.
TG Watch.Watch, therefore, that ye may be TG Procrastination.ready. Even so. Amen.

div.p: Revelation given through Joseph Smith the Prophet, at Thompson, Ohio, May 20, 1831. At this time the Saints migrating from the eastern states began to arrive in Ohio, and it became necessary to make definite arrangements for their settlement. As this undertaking belonged particularly to the bishop’s office, Bishop Edward Partridge sought instruction on the matter, and the Prophet inquired of the Lord.

1–8, Edward Partridge is appointed to regulate stewardships and properties; 9–12, The Saints are to deal honestly and receive alike; 13–15, They are to have a bishop’s storehouse and to organize properties according to the Lord’s law; 16–20, Ohio is to be a temporary gathering place.

chapter.verse: Hearken unto me, saith the Lord your God, and I will speak unto my servant D&C 50:39; 52:24.Edward Partridge, and give unto him directions; for it must needs be that he receive directions how to organize this people.
For it must needs be that they be TG Church Organization.organized according to my D&C 42:30 (30–39); 51:15; 105:5.laws; if otherwise, they will be cut off.

Wherefore, let my servant Edward Partridge, and those whom he has chosen, in whom I am well pleased, appoint unto this people their TG Family, Managing Finances in.portions, every man D&C 49:20. TG Consecration.equal according to his family, according to his circumstances and his wants and Acts 2:45.needs.

And let my servant Edward Partridge, when he shall appoint a man his D&C 83:5.portion, give unto him a writing that shall secure unto him his portion, that he shall hold it, even this right and this inheritance in the church, until he transgresses and is not accounted worthy by the voice of the church, according to the D&C 42:32 (30–39).laws and D&C 1:6 (6, 37); 33:14; 42:13.covenants of the church, to belong to the church.

And if he shall transgress and is not accounted worthy to belong to the church, he shall not have power to D&C 42:37 (30–39). See also section 83.claim that portion which he has consecrated unto the bishop for the poor and needy of my church; therefore, he shall not retain the gift, but shall only have D&C 56:10.claim on that portion that is deeded unto him.
And thus all things shall be made sure, 1 Pet. 2:13 (13–14); D&C 44:4; 98:5 (5–7); 109:54.according to the D&C 58:21.laws of the land.
And let that which belongs to this people be appointed unto this people.

And the D&C 58:51 (49–51); 60:10; 84:104.money which is left unto this people—let there be an D&C 84:113.agent appointed unto this people, to take the D&C 63:40 (40, 43, 46).money to provide food and raiment, according to the wants of this people.
And let every man deal TG Honesty.honestly, and be alike among this people, and receive alike, that ye may be TG Unity.one, even as I have commanded you.
And let that which belongeth to this people not be taken and given unto that of IE another branch of the Church, not another denomination. D&C 60:9.another church.
Wherefore, if another church would receive money of this church, let them D&C 42:54 (42, 53–54).pay unto this church again according as they shall agree;
And this shall be done through the bishop or the agent, which shall be appointed by the TG Common Consent.voice of the church.

And again, let the bishop appoint a D&C 42:55; 58:24 (24, 37). TG Welfare.storehouse unto this church; and let all things both in money and in meat, which are more than is D&C 42:33 (33–34, 55); 82:18 (17–19); 119:1 (1–3).needful for the wants of this people, be kept in the hands of the bishop.
And let him also reserve unto D&C 31:5.himself for his own wants, and for the wants of his family, as he shall be employed in doing this business.
And thus I grant unto this people a privilege of organizing themselves according to my D&C 42:30 (30–39); 51:2.laws.
And I consecrate unto them this land for a D&C 48:5.little season, until I, the Lord, shall provide for them otherwise, and command them to go hence;
And the hour and the day is not given unto them, wherefore let them act upon this land as for years, and this shall turn unto them for their good.
Behold, this shall be IE a pattern. D&C 72:23 (19–26).an example unto my servant Edward Partridge, in other places, in all churches.

And whoso is found a Matt. 24:45; Luke 16:10; D&C 6:13; 138:12. TG Trustworthiness.faithful, a Prov. 11:9 (9–11).just, and a wise TG Stewardship.steward shall enter into the TG Joy.joy of his Lord, and shall inherit eternal life.
Verily, I say unto you, I am Jesus Christ, who Rev. 22:7 (6–16).cometh quickly, in an Matt. 24:44.hour you think not. Even so. Amen.

div.p: Revelation given through Joseph Smith the Prophet to the elders of the Church, at Kirtland, Ohio, June 6, 1831. A conference had been held at Kirtland, beginning on the 3rd and closing on the 6th of June. At this conference the first distinctive ordinations to the office of high priest were made, and certain manifestations of false and deceiving spirits were discerned and rebuked.

1–2, The next conference is designated to be held in Missouri; 3–8, Appointments of certain elders to travel together are made; 9–11, The elders are to teach what the apostles and prophets have written; 12–21, Those enlightened by the Spirit bring forth fruits of praise and wisdom; 22–44, Various elders are appointed to go forth preaching the gospel while traveling to Missouri for the conference.

chapter.verse: Behold, thus saith the Lord unto the elders whom he hath called and chosen in these last days, by the TG Called of God.voice of his Spirit—

Saying: I, the Lord, will make known unto you what I will that ye shall do from this time until the next conference, which shall be held in Missouri, upon the D&C 29:8 (7–8); 45:66 (64–66); 57:1; 103:24.land which I will D&C 58:57; 84:3 (3–4, 31); 103:35; 105:15.consecrate unto my people, which are a Ps. 135:4; 3 Ne. 5:21 (21–26); D&C 19:27; 49:24 (23–25); 109:65.remnant of Jacob, and those who are heirs according to the TG Abrahamic Covenant; Covenants.covenant.

Wherefore, verily I say unto you, let my servants Joseph Smith, Jun., and Sidney Rigdon take their journey as soon as preparations can be made to leave their homes, and journey to the land of D&C 54:8 (7–8); 57:1.Missouri.
And inasmuch as they are faithful unto me, it shall be made known unto them what they shall do;
And it shall also, inasmuch as they are faithful, be made D&C 57:2 (1–3).known unto them the TG Lands of Inheritance.land of your inheritance.
And inasmuch as they are not faithful, they shall be cut off, even as I will, as seemeth me good.
And again, verily I say unto you, let my servant Lyman Wight and my servant John Corrill take their journey speedily;
And also my servant John Murdock, and my servant Hyrum Smith, take their journey unto the same place by the way of Detroit.

And let them journey from thence preaching the word by the way, saying Mosiah 18:19 (19–20); D&C 42:12; 52:36.none other things than that which the TG Prophets, Mission of; Scriptures, Value of.prophets and apostles have written, and that which is taught them by the TG Holy Ghost, Comforter; Teaching with the Spirit.Comforter through the prayer of faith.

Let them go Mark 6:7; Luke 10:1; D&C 61:35; 62:5.two by two, and thus let them preach by the way in every congregation, baptizing by John 1:26.water, and the laying on of the TG Hands, Laying on of.hands by the water’s side.
For thus saith the Lord, I will cut my work short in Rom. 9:28.righteousness, for the days come that I will send forth Matt. 12:20.judgment unto victory.
And let my servant Lyman Wight beware, for Satan desireth to Luke 22:31.sift him as chaff.
And behold, he that is Neh. 7:2; Matt. 25:23; D&C 132:53.faithful shall be made ruler over many things.
And again, I will give unto you a pattern in all things, that ye may not be deceived; for Satan is abroad in the land, and he goeth forth Rev. 13:14 (11–18).deceiving the nations—
Wherefore he that prayeth, whose spirit is TG Contrite Heart.contrite, the same is Gen. 4:7.accepted of me if he obey mine TG Ordinance.ordinances.
He that TG Communication.speaketh, whose spirit is contrite, whose language is meek and TG Edification.edifieth, the same is of God if he obey mine ordinances.

And again, he that trembleth under my power shall be made D&C 66:8; 133:58.strong, and shall bring forth fruits of praise and TG Wisdom.wisdom, according to the revelations and truths which I have given you.
And again, he that is overcome and Matt. 3:10.bringeth not forth fruits, even according to this pattern, is not of me.
Wherefore, by this pattern ye shall TG Discernment, Spiritual.know the spirits in all cases under the whole heavens.
And the days have come; according to men’s faith it shall be Matt. 8:13.done unto them.
Behold, this commandment is given unto all the elders whom I have chosen.

And again, verily I say unto you, let my servant D&C 31:1; 56:5 (5–6); 75:31.Thomas B. Marsh and my servant D&C 33:1.Ezra Thayre take their journey also, preaching the word by the way unto this same land.
And again, let my servant Isaac Morley and my servant Ezra Booth take their journey, also preaching the word by the way unto this same land.
And again, let my servants D&C 51:1 (1–18); 57:7.Edward Partridge and Martin Harris take their journey with my servants Sidney Rigdon and Joseph Smith, Jun.
Let my servants David Whitmer and Harvey Whitlock also take their journey, and preach by the way unto this same land.
And let my servants D&C 32:1; 50:37; 97:3; 103:30 (30–37).Parley P. Pratt and D&C 34:1; 103:40; 124:129; 136:13.Orson Pratt take their journey, and preach by the way, even unto this same land.
And let my servants Solomon Hancock and Simeon Carter also take their journey unto this same land, and preach by the way.
Let my servants Edson Fuller and Jacob Scott also take their journey.
Let my servants Levi W. Hancock and Zebedee Coltrin also take their journey.
Let my servants Reynolds Cahoon and Samuel H. Smith also take their journey.
Let my servants Wheeler Baldwin and William Carter also take their journey.
And let my servants D&C 54:2.Newel Knight and D&C 56:6.Selah J. Griffin both be ordained, and also take their journey.
Yea, verily I say, let all these take their journey unto one place, in their several courses, and one man shall not build upon another’s Rom. 15:20.foundation, neither journey in another’s track.
He that is faithful, the same shall be kept and blessed with much Col. 1:6; Alma 32:42 (28–42); 3 Ne. 14:16.fruit.
